channel.title: Souman Paul - Writing
channel.description: Portfolio of Souman Paul, a full stack engineer, AI product builder, and GenAI systems builder focused on scalable web platforms, backend architecture, and applied AI workflows.

item.title: BFF Frontend Architecture: Why It Keeps Complex UIs Sane
item.description: A practical look at the Backend-for-Frontend pattern, where it fits, and how it helps frontend teams ship faster without leaking backend complexity into the UI.
item.author: paul1729blr@gmail.com (Souman Paul)

item.title: OAuth 2.0 in Practice: Flows, Tokens, and the Parts That Matter
item.description: A practical explanation of OAuth 2.0 for product engineers: what problem it solves, how the authorization code flow works, and the mistakes that usually cause security bugs.
item.author: paul1729blr@gmail.com (Souman Paul)
